languages.text: Whenever {g|f:50a2c2de8bae4745b4eac66b8aab9be8}Arbites Marshall Helmet{/g} wielder hits an enemy with a shield, all allies in 3sq range gain non-stacking +5 Resolve until the end of their turn.
